summary: Marketing and sales website for 'Adarshpatel Marketing' — a business dealing in dairy feed products, agri inputs, and coffee trading. The website should feature an agriculture-themed background with imagery related to coffee, fertilizer, dairy, and farming.
architectural_notes: Business name: Adarshpatel Marketing — multi-product agribusiness (dairy feed, agri inputs, coffee trading)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wide panoramic collage of lush green agricultural fields, coffee plantation rows, dairy cows grazing, and bags of fertilizer under warm golden sunlight — earthy, vibrant, photorealistic style (hero-bg.dim_1600x700.png)
- Close-up of dairy cattle with a soft green pasture background, warm sunlight — photorealistic (dairy-feed-bg.dim_800x400.png)
- Overhead flat-lay of agricultural inputs: fertilizer bags, seed packets, spray bottles, and soil — earthy tones (agri-inputs-bg.dim_800x400.png)
- Rich roasted coffee beans scattered on a rustic wooden surface with a small coffee plant sprig — warm brown tones (coffee-bg.dim_800x400.png)
- Stylized green leaf and wheat stalk logo mark illustration for Adarshpatel Marketing — clean, minimal, on transparent background (logo-icon.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a branded homepage for 'Adarshpatel Marketing' with a hero section displaying the company name, tagline covering dairy feed, agri inputs, and coffee trading, and a prominent call-to-action button. The hero section must use the generated agriculture-themed background image.
Build a Dairy Feed Products section showcasing dairy feed products with product cards that include a product name, short description, and an 'Enquire Now' or 'Contact Us' button.
Build an Agri Inputs section listing agricultural input products (fertilizers, pesticides, seeds, etc.) with product cards showing product name, short description, and an enquiry button.
Build a Coffee Trading section highlighting coffee trading services and coffee varieties available, with product/service cards and an enquiry button.
Add a Contact / Enquiry section with a simple form (Name, Phone Number, Product of Interest, Message fields) that stores submitted enquiries in the backend canister.

Apply a rich, earthy agricultural visual theme throughout the website — warm greens, deep soil browns, coffee browns, and cream/off-white tones. Use bold serif-style headings, clear section dividers, and the generated background image as a full-width hero backdrop. Ensure the design is consistent across all sections.

Add a navigation bar with the company logo/name 'Adarshpatel Marketing' and links to all major sections: Home, Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading, Contact. The navbar should be sticky and accessible on scroll.
Render the generated static images (hero background, product section backgrounds) from the frontend/public/assets/generated directory throughout the website.

new_feature_requests.summary: Dairy feed product marketing and sales section
Agriculture-themed background with coffee, fertilizer, dairy, farming imagery
